channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping between 48-58 Chestnut Rise, 13th May
item.description:
Reported over a week ago - still here - please remove urgently - residents shouldn't have to live like this - large mattress and other furniture dumped across 5 properties
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chestnut Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted furniture dumped on street, 13th May
item.description:
Flytipping by resident.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Elmwood road could do with a weed and a sweep to ensure that drains do not get blocked, 13th May
item.description:
Weeding and sweeping required - to help stop blocked drains etc.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 13th May
item.description:
White mercedes has been left here now for many months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large and small unsightly weeds. Whole path needs cleaning and clearing, 13th May
item.description:
The whole community path needs cleaning and clearing of unsightly large and small weeds
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping: Discarded mattresses, 13th May
item.description:
Discarded mattresses located near 12 Jamaica Road ( opposite Arnold Estate). They have been there for over a week. Please remove ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-12, Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hanging window hazard, 13th May
item.description:
Upper floor window hanging off hinges and moving vigorously in window. In danger of falling on someone!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144, Ballards Lane, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy pavements, 13th May
item.description:
Because of the continuous fly tipping of all kinds rubbish, this area has become greasy and hazardous to walk on and is an eyesore. Could this be thoroughly jet washed, please and instill stronger measures to prevent/catch the fly tippers, thankyou.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bin men pressed wrong button on lorry opening the back depositing debris onto the road. They took pic and drove off leaving debris including glass in the road, 13th May
item.description:
This was reported at the time yesterday. Today a council vehicle came out and men looked and dove off. The debris was caused by the council and should be cleaned up by the council. We had a puncture yesterday no doubt caused by this debris which hence cost us £168 for a new tyre (we had a new set only four months ago)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65A, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole compost bin contents left outside 5759 Seton Road, 13th May
item.description:
Binmen who collected compost bins I’ve obviously dropped the bin leaving all the contents of somebody’s style food outside my house where they’re too lazy to pick it up. This was at @ 1110 am can see this on my cctv as well , so we have loads of style food left on the pavement in the curb outside number 57 and 59 Seaton Road. This is unacceptable that they don’t clear up their mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seaton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox at no.25, 13th May
item.description:
Dead fox found at no.25. Resident has placed it in a bag and at the edge of the front garden, please collect.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Yoakley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Facing the wrong way, 13th May
item.description:
Traffic lights for traffic filtering right on to Tower Bridge have been moved so they incorrectly face towards traffic driving north over Tower Bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Hill, Whitechapel, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Grass verges outside house numbers 44 & 45 White Oak Drive, 13th May
item.description:
The grass verges outside house numbers 44 & 45 White Oak Drive have not been cut this week when the maintenance team cut the other verges on the street on 11 & 12 May. This has happened before. I asked the maintenance team this week to cut the grass on those verges but they did not! Please can you arrange for the maintenance team to return as soon as possible to cut the grass on these verges. And please can you inform the maintenance team to always cut the grass on those verges on future visits. Thank you for your help.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): White Oak Drive, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th May
item.description:
Rubbish and ply wood left on Old Woolwich Rd junction with Hoskins St near Park Row Garage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoskins Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On council land abandoned, 13th May
item.description:
This is on council land and needs a PCN

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunn Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped on pavement., 13th May
item.description:
Sofa dumped on pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4-7, Lime Row, Lower Belvedere, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedges blocking pavement, 13th May
item.description:
Whoever lives here does not trim the bushes and it's almost impossible to pass on the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fine them please, 13th May
item.description:
Motorbike pay & display bay blocked, amongst other problems..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garden Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris, 13th May
item.description:
Our street is never cleaned and there’s always rubbish left behind after the rubbish/recycling collections

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned road works signs?, 13th May
item.description:
Been here ages

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradbury Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
